div.head: The Ambassador in Paraguay (Frost) to the Secretary of State
div.p: 85. For Under Secretary. President sent for me this morning to sound out possibility of loan or aid to build hangars for planes and storehouses for other Lend-Lease material, estimating cost at $185,000, and stressing that inquiry was personal and tentative. I ventured suggestion that such a request might make poor impression at Washington in view of very special Lend-Lease termsPresumably this refers to the articles under which Paraguay was obligated to repay $300,000 of the $11,000,000 authorized for defense articles for Paraguay. for this country and in view of fact that economies of 3% in regular Paraguayan budget would yield sum indicated. President said half heartedly that doubtless I was right. Interview was cordial.
